text:
A Choice with No Regrets is a visual novel written by Gun Snark. Other articles with this name include:

A Choice With No Regrets: Preview: The preview visual novel preceding the full version.
Attack on Titan: No Regrets: The manga adaptation of the visual novel.
A Choice with No Regrets: Part One: The first episode of the Attack on Titan anime OVA adaptation of the visual novel and manga.
A Choice with No Regrets: Part Two: The second episode of the Attack on Titan anime OVA adaptation of the visual novel and manga.
